summary: The South Bay's venture funding machine hit overdrive in March and early April, with nearly $4 billion deployed across 24 companies—led by Nexthop AI's $500M Series B in Santa Clara and SiFive's $400M round in Santa Clara. Beyond the headline deals, hiring remains broadly steady: seven local firms are actively expanding while two are consolidating. With no major tech events this week, the action stays behind closed doors as companies integrate new capital and jostle for engineering talent.
